---
title: "New Research Grant from the World Bank"
description: "DEN Economics Lab receives a World Bank grant to study digital financial inclusion in rural Indonesia."
date: "2026-02-10"
categories: [grant, financial-inclusion]
author: "DEN Economics Lab"
---

DEN Economics Lab has been awarded a **World Bank research grant** to study the
impacts of **digital financial inclusion** in rural Indonesia. The three-year
project will combine administrative data from OJK with primary survey work in
selected districts in Sulawesi and Nusa Tenggara.

**Principal investigator.** Siti Aminah

**Partners.** OJK, World Bank

**Duration.** 2026–2028
